name: hitavirtechregistrationapp
description: HitaVirTech Batch 5 — Data Engineering & Agentic AI Registration

scripts.build: npm run css && npm run js
scripts.css: npx clean-css-cli assets/css/base.css assets/css/layout.css assets/css/components.css -o dist/assets/css/main.min.css
scripts.js: npx terser assets/js/scroll-anim.js assets/js/stack-tabs.js assets/js/countdown.js --compress --mangle --output dist/assets/js/main.min.js
